payload.prompt: Generate the Executive Briefing report for this project. Use the Task tool to delegate to the executive-briefing subagent. The subagent will read the wiki and knowledge graph and produce a one-page status report (top 3 risks, decisions made this week, blocking open questions). Save the result under out/reports/.

Generate the Engineering FAQ report. Use the Task tool to delegate to the engineering-faq subagent. The subagent will traverse the knowledge graph's open-question nodes and answer each from connected decisions and evidence. Save the result under out/reports/.

Generate the Onboarding Study Guide. Use the Task tool to delegate to the onboarding-study-guide subagent. The subagent will traverse the project's knowledge graph in dependency order from the mission root, suitable for a new team member. Save the result under out/reports/.

Generate the Decision Register. Use the Task tool to delegate to the decision-register subagent. The subagent will output every Decision node as a table row with supporting Evidence and contradicting Risks. Save the result under out/reports/.
